name: Midazolam
description: Benzodiazepine mai gajeren aiki tare da saurin farawa. An fi so don kwantar da hankali, RSI pre-magani, da kuma IM/IN sarrafa kama. Hanyoyin IM da na ciki suna ba da fa'ida mai mahimmanci a saitunan filin.
indications: Gudanar da kama (IM/IN lokacin da babu IV)
dose: Kwanciyar hankali: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV titrated. Tsari: 1-5 MG IV jinkirin turawa. IM: 0.2 mg/kg. IN: 0.2 mg/kg (max 10 mg). Matsayin epilepticus IM: 10 MG IM (babba).
contraindications: Mummunan maye barasa tare da daidaitawar zuciya da jijiyoyin jini
warnings: Bacin rai na numfashi -- duba hanyar iska, sami wakili mai juyawa (flumazenil) idan akwai.
Hypotension musamman tare da haɗin gwiwar opioid.
Saurin allura na IV yana haifar da bugun jini -- turawa a hankali.

pediatric.dose: Kwanciyar hankali: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV. IM: 0.1-0.2 mg/kg. A cikin: 0.2-0.3 mg/kg. Kamewa IM: 0.2 mg/kg (max 10 mg).
pediatric.note: A hanya mai amfani musamman ga yara -- yana guje wa shiga IV.

obstetric.note: Ketare mahaifa. Maganin jinya mai yiwuwa. Yi amfani da ƙaramin tasiri mai inganci; saka idanu ga jariri idan an ba shi kusa da bayarwa.

source: JTS CPG / Standard Procedural Sedation Guidelines
